## nsc instance upload

Upload a file to an instance.

```
nsc instance upload [instance-id] <local-path> <remote-path> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -c, --container_name string   Target a container by name.
  -h, --help                    help for upload
      --mkdir                   Create parent directories on the remote if they don't exist.
```
